args.subject: Summary of the client meeting
args.body:
Dear John,

I hope this email finds you well. I'm writing to provide you with a summary of our recent meeting held on May 5, 2024.

During the meeting, we discussed your requirements for the new project and agreed on the project timeline and key milestones. We also reviewed the initial design concepts and gathered your valuable feedback.

Here are the key action items:
- I will be updating the project plan based on your feedback.
- David will coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase.

Please mark your calendar for the next meeting scheduled for June 1, 2024.

Best regards,
Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech
